name: M365 Users with High Risk Level
description: Identifies users flagged as high risk by Entra ID Identity Protection
query: SELECT id, user_principal_name, user_display_name, risk_level, risk_state, risk_detail FROM entra_risky_users WHERE risk_level = 'high'
remediation: Investigate high-risk users immediately. Require password reset and MFA re-registration. Review sign-in logs for suspicious activity.
